channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: A Florida man faces execution for killing a Miami Herald employee abducted on her lunch break
item.description: STARKE, Fla. (AP) — A man convicted of killing a woman who was carjacked on her lunch break from her job at The Miami Herald is set to be executed Tuesday evening.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Kentucky watches for surging rivers to recede so widespread cleanup can begin
item.description: FRANKFORT, Ky. (AP) — After days of deluges overfilled rivers to near-record levels across Kentucky, residents were anxious on Tuesday to return to their flooded homes and assess what would be salvageable, even as stubbornly high waters kept some of them waiting even longer.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER, KRISTIN M. HALL and JONATHAN MATTISE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NASA astronaut arrives at International Space Station aboard Russian spacecraft
item.description: NASA astronaut Jonny Kim and Russian cosmonauts Sergey Ryzhikov and Alexey Zubritsky entered the ISS after a successful launch from Kazakhstan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Homeland Security waiver allows feds to bypass environmental rules to build border wall
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A waiver issued Tuesday by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security allows the federal government to bypass environmental regulations and begin construction immediately on stretches of the border wall in Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: National Weather Service no longer translating products for non-English speakers
item.description: The National Weather Service is no longer providing language translations of its products, a change that experts say could put non-English speakers at risk of missing potentially life-saving warnings about extreme weather.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: More Americans call taxes unfair: Poll
item.description: More Americans say that the amount they will pay in federal income taxes this year is "unfair" than those who say their amount is reasonable, according to a new poll, and most say that corporations and wealthy people are not paying enough.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Last chance to claim $1,400 stimulus check from 2021 nears
item.description: Taxpayers who haven’t filed their 2021 tax returns may still be eligible to receive one (or more) stimulus payments sent during the height of the pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Democratic-led cities and states push back on threats to cut US school funding over DEI
item.description: Some Democratic-led states and cities are pushing back on a Trump administration threat to cut education funding over diversity, equity, and inclusion programs, creating a standoff that could test how far the White House is willing to go to press its demands on the nation’s schools.
item.dc:creator: Collin Binkley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New York City tolls that Trump wants to scrap are likely to remain through at least the summer
item.description: New York’s $9 congestion pricing on most drivers entering the most traffic-snarled parts of Manhattan appears likely to continue through the summer and possibly into the fall as a lawsuit over the toll proceeds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Epstein accuser Virginia Giuffre leaves hospital after crash with school bus
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein accuser Virginia Giuffre has left an Australian hospital a week after she was involved in a crash with a loaded school bus that made international headlines.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boris Johnson pecked by ostrich
item.description: Former British Prime Minister Boris Johnson had a fowl encounter with an ostrich during a sight-seeing trip in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, Fox 5

item.title: California man arrested near Justice Kavanaugh's home with a gun pleads guilty to attempted murder
item.description: GREENBELT, Md. (AP) — A California man pleaded guilty on Tuesday to trying to kill U.S. Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh at his home in a suburb of Washington, D.C., nearly three years ago. Nicholas John Roske was arrested near Kavanaugh’s home in Chevy Chase, Maryland, in June 2022.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ICE agent impersonations spike in wake of immigration crackdown
item.description: Impersonatorsposing as immigration agents are spreading fear among migrants already uncertain about their future in the country.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, WGN 9

item.title: House Democrats targeting 3 California Republicans in 2026
item.description: The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee rolled out a list of 35 House Republicans it plans to target in the 2026 midterms on Tuesday, including three California seats. The list, which the DCCC called its Districts in Play, includes Alaska Rep. Nick Begich (R); Arizona Reps.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, KTLA 5

item.title: Small plane skids off runway at Oregon airport, ends up in bay
item.description: A small private plane attempting to land at an Oregon airport skidded off the runway and into a body of water, leaving 5 people injured.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Foran, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-member of former Gambia dictator's military unit is on trial in the US for torture
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Opening statements are expected Tuesday in the trial of a man accused of torturing political opponents of Gambia's former military dictator Yahya Jammeh nearly 20 years ago, the latest international trial tied to his regime.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How Philadelphia police draw on personal experiences to respond to mental health crises
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — On a frigid February morning, Vanity Cordero, a Philadelphia police officer, heard a call over the radio for a man threatening to jump from a bridge. The details sounded familiar.
item.dc:creator: CLAUDIA LAUER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mexican man convicted of killing his child to be deported after encountering ICE officers in Montana jail
item.description: Carlos Ambriz, who was convicted of deliberate homicide in the death of his child, is in custody after he encountered ICE officers inside the Montana prison where he was serving time.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal magistrate weighs arguments in Idaho news groups' execution access lawsuit
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — A federal magistrate judge is expected to hear arguments Tuesday morning in a lawsuit brought by three news organizations that say Idaho prison officials are unconstitutionally hiding parts of lethal injection executions from public view.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Bridal shops brace for impact as tariffs affecting wedding dress prices
item.description: Most of the world's wedding dresses are made in China and the tariffs are increasing wholesale prices for dresses and fabrics.
item.dc:creator: Ella Wales, NewsNation

item.title: Reversible damage found in marathon runners' brains: study
item.description: A 26.2-mile run can do some damage to the brain, a study shows, but the impact is temporary and reversible.
item.dc:creator: Ashley N. Soriano, Fox 5

item.title: Trump threatens additional 50 percent tariff on China
item.description: The White House had already imposed a 20 percent tariff on Chinese imports over fentanyl concerns, meaning China could face an effective tariff rate as high as 70 percent.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Idaho mom who killed 2 of her kids goes on trial over husband's death
item.description: Lori Vallow Daybell, the Idaho mother with doomsday religious beliefs who was convicted of killing her two youngest children and conspiring to murder a romantic rival, is on trial again. This time, she's accused in Arizona of conspiring to murder her estranged husband.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Miami’s ‘Little Venezuela’ fears Trump's moves against migration
item.description: DORAL, Fla. (AP) — Wilmer Escaray left Venezuela in 2007 and enrolled at Miami Dade College, opening his first restaurant six years later.
item.dc:creator: GISELA SALOMON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Harriet Tubman reference removed from National Parks' Underground Railroad web page
item.description: The National Parks Service (NPS) has removed a reference to abolitionist Harriet Tubman from its webpage dedicated to the Underground Railroad.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US stocks dip after careening through a manic day following Trump's latest tariff threat
item.description: U.S. stocks swung wildly in a manic Monday after President Donald Trump doubled down on his tariffs, despite seeing how much Wall Street wants him to do the opposite.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US stocks dip after careening through a manic day following Trump's latest tariff threat
item.description: U.S. stocks swung wildly in a manic Monday after President Donald Trump doubled down on his tariffs, despite seeing how much Wall Street wants him to do the opposite.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: RFK Jr. says MMR vaccine 'most effective' way to stop spread of measles after Texas child's death
item.description: Kennedy, who has a history of vaccine skepticism, made the remarks after visiting the family of an unvaccinated 8-year-old girl who died from the disease.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says he's not backing down, calls tariffs 'medicine' as markets reel
item.description: Speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One, Trump said he didn't want global markets to fall, but also that he wasn't concerned about the massive sell-off either.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump tariffs pose danger for vulnerable Republicans
item.description: Vulnerable House Republicans are being put on defense amid the fallout from President Donald Trump’s sweeping global tariffs, which have stoked uncertainty about the economy.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, KRON4

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RFK Jr. visits epicenter of Texas measles outbreak after death of second child who was infected
item.description: U.S. Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. visited the epicenter of Texas' still-growing measles outbreak on Sunday, the same day a funeral was held for a second young child who was not vaccinated and died from a measles-related illness.
item.dc:creator: DEVI SHASTRI and AMANDA SEITZ, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Las Vegas Sphere launching 'experience' around classic film
item.description: Sphere, the famed immersive Las Vegas entertainment arena, is set to debut two new "Sphere Experiences" later this year — and one is based on a beloved classic motion picture.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, ABC 4

item.title: Justice Department seeks 7 year sentence for George Santos
item.description: Prosecutors said the length of the requested sentence — 87 months — reflects the serious nature of Santos’s “unparalleled” crimes.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Budget calculator: Calculate your monthly budget using the 50/30/20 rule
item.description: The 50/30/20 rule is a popular budgeting technique. Use this calculator to figure out how to spend your money.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, Fox 5

item.title: Microsoft's AI division head wants to create a lasting relationship between chatbots and their users
item.description: Fifty years after the founding of Microsoft, the CEO of its artificial intelligence division has a big task: develop a new product line as integral to daily life as the software giant's past innovations.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4
